title: Reuters: Nasdaq and S&P 500 slip while Dow hits record high
description: Reuters reported the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500 finished lower Tuesday under technology-stock pressure while the Dow Jones Industrial Average marked a second straight record close.
extracted_text: Reuters preliminary close: S&P 500 7,512.44, -41.85 (-0.55%); Nasdaq Composite 26,382.81, -301.13 (-1.15%); Dow Jones Industrial Average 52,016.57, +345.54 (+0.67%). Tech weakness pressured the S&P 500 and Nasdaq while financials and industrials led gains.
summary: Reuters: Nasdaq and S&P 500 slip while Dow hits record high — Reuters reported the Nasdaq Composite and S&P 500 finished lower Tuesday under technology-stock pressure while the Dow Jones Industrial Average marked a second straight record close.

title: Reuters Trading Day: US stocks mixed, oil slides, SpaceX continues ascent
description: Reuters framed the June 16 session as mixed: tech shares weighed on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, Dow notched another record, and WTI/Brent fell sharply after U.S.-Iran deal details.
extracted_text: Reuters Trading Day said Wall Street was mixed Tuesday: tech shares weighed on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, Dow reached a record close, WTI settled down 5.8%, Brent down 5.1%, and investors awaited the Federal Reserve decision.
summary: Reuters Trading Day: US stocks mixed, oil slides, SpaceX continues ascent — Reuters framed the June 16 session as mixed: tech shares weighed on the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, Dow notched another record, and WTI/Brent fell sharply after U.S.-Iran deal det...

title: Stock Market News for Jun 16, 2026
extracted_text: Wall Street closed higher on Tuesday after the U.S.-Iran peace agreement eased geopolitical tensions. Dow +0.9% to 51,671, Nasdaq +3.1% to 26,684, S&P 500 +1.7% to 7,554. VIX fell 8.4% to 16.20. Seven of 11 sectors positive; tech +3.4%, energy -3.6%. NY Empire State Mfg fell to 5.7 vs 13.9 consensus. Industrial Production +0.1% MoM.
review_note: Kept after session-window audit: timestamp inside 2026-06-16 09:30-18:00 ET post-market window.

title: Stock Market Today (June 16, 2026): SpaceX jumps 20% after announcing AI deal; Nasdaq, S&P 500 decline
extracted_text: Mixed equities intraday with Dow +0.96%, S&P -0.08%, Nasdaq -0.52% at 2:58 PM. SpaceX jumped 20% after acquiring Anysphere/Cursor for $60B all-stock. US-Iran ceasefire framework signed, oil fell sharply: WTI -2.6% to $78.66, Brent -2.4% to $81.17. Robinhood cut 10% of workforce. Yum Brands sold Pizza Hut for $2.7B. Housing starts collapsed to 1.177M (-15.4%), NAHB fell to 35.
review_note: Kept after session-window audit: timestamp inside 2026-06-16 09:30-18:00 ET post-market window.
summary: Stock Market Today (June 16, 2026): SpaceX jumps 20% after announcing AI deal; Nasdaq, S&P 500 decline

title: SpaceX locks in $60 billion Cursor deal to close gap with rivals in AI coding race
notable_quotes: "Cursor does not have the scale of OpenAI or Anthropic, but it has built some very impressive coding models relative to cost." — Matt Britzman, Hargreaves Lansdown
"One of the things that makes SpaceX so valuable is how valuable it is. The Cursor acquisition costs materially less in dilution because of SpaceX's high valuation." — Bill Ackman
extracted_text: SpaceX to acquire Anysphere (maker of AI coding agent Cursor) for $60B in all-stock deal, expected to close Q3 2026. Termination fees: $10B standard, $4B antitrust. SpaceX stock +10% on announcement, market cap $2.53T. Cursor annualized B2B revenue $2.6B, prior valuation $50B. Deal strengthens xAI against Anthropic and OpenAI.
review_note: Kept after session-window audit: timestamp inside 2026-06-16 09:30-18:00 ET post-market window.
summary: SpaceX locks in $60 billion Cursor deal to close gap with rivals in AI coding race

title: Robinhood layoffs see company cut 10% of workforce
notable_quotes: "We cannot default to operating as a heavily layered organization. We must be a lean, hyper-focused team where every single individual is empowered to make a massive impact." — Vlad Tenev, CEO
extracted_text: Robinhood Markets announced 10% workforce reduction affecting ~290 employees. CEO Vlad Tenev cited need for lean, hyper-focused team. $20M severance + $8M share-based comp charges booked Q2 2026. Company has ~2,900 FTEs. Q1 headcount rose 22% YoY while revenue per employee fell 8% to $1.4M.
review_note: Kept after session-window audit: timestamp inside 2026-06-16 09:30-18:00 ET post-market window.
summary: Robinhood layoffs see company cut 10% of workforce

title: June Fed Meeting: Live Updates and Commentary
extracted_text: Kevin Warsh chairs first FOMC meeting June 16-17. Rate hold at 3.50-3.75% widely expected. May CPI headline 4.2% YoY, core 2.9%. Energy accounted for >60% of monthly CPI increase. Duke survey: median year-end PCE 3.5%, 17 of 32 former officials say rate hike appropriate in 2026. WTI fell below $80 on Iran deal.
review_note: Kept after session-window audit: timestamp inside 2026-06-16 09:30-18:00 ET post-market window.
summary: June Fed Meeting: Live Updates and Commentary
